event.title: event
event.description: Condition-type to execute if an event is created in the system.

function.title: function
function.description: Condition-type to execute if function is used, replaces actions v1.

request.title: request
request.description: Condition-type to execute if a request on the defined API point happens.

response.title: response
response.description: Condition-type to execute on response if a request on the defined API point happens.

group.title: group
group.description: Event group as condition, all events under this group.

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: The timestamp of the execution creation.

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description: The timestamp of the last change to the execution.

targets.title: targets
targets.description: Ordered list of targets called during the execution.

all.title: all
all.description: All calls to any available services and methods as condition.

all.title: all
all.description: All calls to any available services and methods as condition.
